text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Heehee, looks like I lost again, huh?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Just when I was admiring how fast everyone was, I
got overtaken!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
But while I was running, I could hear the audience
shouting!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Things like "Go Urara!" and "Never give up!"

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
So I really tried hard to run as fast as I could all
the way to the end!
choice_data_list:
It'd be nice to answer those cheers with a win,
though.

It'd be nice to answer those cheers with a win,
though.

text_block_list.text:
So I really tried hard to run as fast as I could all
the way to the end!
choice_data_list:
It'd be nice to answer those cheers with a win,

It'd be nice to answer those cheers with a win,
though.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Just wait and see! Next time I'm gonna whoosh
right past all of them!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Yep! I was thinking that too when I crossed the
finish line.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Let's both try harder, Trainer! We'll never give up!
